entry.title: Bill 105 (Hawaiʻi County): Passed Second Reading → —
entry.content:
AMENDS ORDINANCE NO. 25-45, AS AMENDED, THE OPERATING BUDGET OF THE COUNTY OF HAWAIʻI FOR THE FISCAL YEAR ENDING JUNE 30, 2026

Appropriates revenues in the Fund Balance from Previous Year account ($16,515,493.51) and appropriates the same to the Housing Production account.

Status: Passed Second Reading → —

Latest action: On agenda 2025-12-17

View on the council site

entry.title: Bill 105 (Hawaiʻi County): — → Passed Second Reading

Appropriates revenues in the Fund Balance from Previous Year account ($16,515,493.51) and appropriates the same to the Housing Production account.

Status: — → Passed Second Reading

Latest action: Council: Bill 105 passes second & final reading - 12/17/25

entry.title: New: Bill 105 (Hawaiʻi County) — On agenda 2025-12-17
entry.content:
AMENDS ORDINANCE NO. 25-45, AS AMENDED, THE OPERATING BUDGET OF THE COUNTY OF HAWAIʻI FOR THE FISCAL YEAR ENDING JUNE 30, 2026
